description: Shorter version of the baseline stepwise prompt, useful for testing whether reduced instruction length changes model behavior.
p1_visibility: Can the plant's '{feature_display}' be determined from this image? Answer only: YES, NO, or INCONCLUSIVE. Use YES only when the feature is clearly visible.{leaf_absence_note}
p2_intro:
Select the best '{feature_display}' for this plant. If the image is unclear, choose 'Cannot determine from this image'.

Options:
p2_response_instruction: Return only "{example_value}" or another exact option text, or "{uncertain_option}".
leaf_absence_note: If no leaves are apparent, treat that absence as visible evidence and answer YES.
